response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matches. The Reference JSON incorrectly identified the opening song as 'Watch me!' and missed the MC transition, but its lyrics for the second song 'Watch me!' were accurate for the latter half of the video. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for 'Watch me!' lyrics; however, 'Pleiades!' (the first song) and the MC greeting were manually transcribed and translated due to their omission from the JSON. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed strictly to vocal bursts. Applied the 'Instantaneous Transitions' rule for the fast-paced song segments to prevent cascading delays, ensuring the end-time of one subtitle block matches the start-time of the next where vocal flow is continuous.
